title: Sensitive-Office Nationality Restriction Expands into General Civic Disability
description: Congress imposes a blanket dual-citizenship exclusion for a broad class of federal offices and tries to justify it as a sensitive-office safeguard. The scenario tests whether Article IX forces such restrictions to remain narrowly tailored exceptions rather than a general hierarchy of citizenship or nationality.

details.office: a wide class of senior federal offices
details.restriction: a blanket exclusion of all dual citizens
